pr.title: Add RFC 0007: Scorer Presets for Common Evaluation Patterns
pr.body:
## Summary

This RFC proposes a `Preset` class for MLflow that packages a named, immutable collection of scorers for common evaluation patterns. MLflow ships five built-in presets (`RAG`, `AGENT`, `CONVERSATIONAL_AGENT`, `SAFETY`, `QUALITY`), and users can define their own.

Presets can be passed directly in the `scorers` list alongside individual scorers:

```python
from mlflow.genai.scorers import AGENT, Guidelines

mlflow.genai.evaluate(
    data=eval_dataset,
    scorers=[AGENT, Guidelines(name="tone", guidelines=["Be professional"])],
)
```

Duplicate scorers across presets are automatically deduplicated during validation.

Based on [mlflow/mlflow#21445](https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow/issues/21445).

Also introduces a new scorer proposal: [`TaskSuccess`](https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow/issues/22972) — a ground-truth-free scorer for evaluating agent result quality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: Nehanth
